task_completion.description: Measure the minimum AP dimension in the sagittal view
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blue Sky Plan GUI showing a measurement line across the narrowest part of the airway in the sagittal view.

task_completion.description: Measure the corresponding dimensions in the axial view
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blue Sky Plan GUI showing a measurement line across the airway in the axial view.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the sagittal measurement
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer showing 'sagittal_airway.png' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\AirwayAnalysis' directory, or the image being saved/viewed.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the axial measurement
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer showing 'axial_airway.png' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\AirwayAnalysis' directory, or the image being saved/viewed.
File explorer showing 'airway_report.txt' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\AirwayAnalysis' directory, or a text editor saving the file.

task_completion.description: Report contains the minimum AP dimension and its classification
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing the report contents with a measurement value (in mm) and a valid classification (Normal, Narrowed, or Severely narrowed) that correctly corresponds to the measurement value.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Blue Sky Plan software to take measurements
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking and using the measurement tools within the Blue Sky Plan GUI, rather than faking the screenshots or using terminal commands.

integrity.description: Measurement value in the text report matches the GUI measurement
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical value written in 'airway_report.txt' is identical to the measurement shown on the screen in Blue Sky Plan.

integrity.description: The measurement is within a plausible range for the airway
integrity.visual_evidence: The measured value is between 2.0mm and 25.0mm, consistent with human anatomy and the phantom data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses synthetic dental CBCT phantom data. Plausible measurement range is 2.0-25.0mm. Classification thresholds: Normal (>11mm), Narrowed (6-11mm), Severely narrowed (<6mm). The DICOM resolution is 0.4mm isotropic.
